name: Produces audit packs (renders a per-framework + per-control pack)
summary: Implementer renders an audit pack: a periodised deliverable bundling evidence behind a stated authority and a stated set of controls, with a manifest declaring the evidence ids it carries.
requirements: At least one AuditPack (or equivalent rendered artifact) exists per implemented framework.
At least one AuditPack is scoped to a specific control or AI system.
Every section in the pack lists the evidence ids it relies on, and those ids resolve in the implementer's published ontology.
manual_checks: Reviewer confirms packages/ontology/conformance/validate.mjs passes against the implementer's published ontology (no dangling evidence ids in pack sections).
Reviewer confirms at least one pack is scoped to a framework and at least one is scoped to a control or AI system.
Reviewer confirms the pack's manifest is human-readable and lists the cited evidence ids.
